title: ConformanceClaim
description: A WCAG conformance claim documenting an organization's accessibility compliance for a web resource.

claim_date.description: Date the conformance claim was made or last reviewed.

wcag_version.description: WCAG version for which conformance is claimed.

scope_url.description: URL of the web resource for which the claim is made.

scope_description.description: Description of the scope of the conformance claim.
scope_description.example: The entire example.com website excluding third-party embedded content.

organization.description: Name of the organization making the claim.

evaluation_approach.description: Description of how the conformance evaluation was conducted.
evaluation_approach.example: Combination of automated testing with axe-core and manual expert review.

known_limitations.description: List of known accessibility issues or limitations.
example: Third-party video player may not fully support captions on mobile.
